title: Animated Quarries 2
description: AQ is a mod which adds non-destructive quarries to your world!
body:
### **Welcome to Animated Quarries: Elevate Your Resource Gathering Experience.**
### 
 

Animated Quarries is not just a utility mod - it's an upgrade into the very philosophy of resource gathering. With rich progression, immersive animations, and powerful yet balanced mechanics, this mod turns mining into a visual and strategic experience.

 

## Forge version refactor:
## 
All neoforge 1.21.1 code has been modernized from the older 1.21.4 format and restructured to standard forge conventions.
 
## Refactored GUI and Container logic:
## 
Inventory systems, smelting behavior, and upgrade logic were rewritten for stability and modding compatibility.
 
## New depth and range calcualtion logic:
## 
Quarries now evaluate how many Drill Bits you've inserted, and compute depth dynamically based on your Y-level and world type (Overworld, Nether, End).
 
## Modular Upgrade Detection:
## 
The logic has been upgraded to support Fortune modules, Autosmelting, and Range Upgrades, including stacking effects and diminishing returns, giving players meaningful choices.
 
## Performance-conscious logic:
## 
Quarries scan chunks and break only target blocks based on tags, minimizing lag and unnecessary drops.

## Progressive Tier System:
## Start with the Basic Quarry, then climb the tech tree to Tier 2 and Tier 3, each faster and more efficient. All quarries require Drill Bits to function and break over time.
 
## Intelligent Chunk-Based Mining
## 
The quarry scans and evaluates chunk-level ore density, focusing on valuable ores first and skipping junk blocks. Modded ores are supported automatically, provided they are tagged properly.
 
## Level-Dependent Efficiency:
## 
The deeper you mine, the more drills you'll need. The quarry adjusts based on its Y-position and dimension, giving meaning to your drilling strategy.
 
### Upgrade Modules:
###  
Slot in upgrades to customize your quarry:
Fortune Upgrade - Increases drop quantity based on stack size.
Autosmelter Upgrade - Auto-smelts ores before ejecting them.
Range Upgrade - Expands the block breaking radius.
 
## Sustainable Operation
## 
Quarries aren't infinite. Each action drains internal logic (tracked with itemstacks) based on upgrades, breaking distance, and current depth. This ensures balanced progression.
 
## Geckolib Animations
## 
Drills, arms, and machines move, rotate, and animate - giving you full visual feedback. It's more than just a block. 
 
## Crafting Recipes Included:
## 
_Craft all the essentials and upgrades:_
Drill Bit
Tier 1, 2, and 3 Quarries
Essence of Fortune
Autosmelter Module
Range Upgrade
 
## Why You Should Try It:
## 
Whether you're a redstone master, a tech mod enjoyer, or someone who hates stripmining, Animated Quarries gives you a visually rich, logically balanced, and customizable solution to resource gathering.
No filler. No bloat. Just you, your quarry, and a chunk full of treasure.
